scope: Read-only comparison of repository migration version IDs with the linked staging Supabase migration ledger. No migration, transaction, notification, user, document, or database record was created, updated, or deleted.

repository.versionExtraction: Leading numeric prefix before the first underscore in each .sql filename.

stagingLedger.comparisonKey: Migration version ID only; the Supabase ledger does not provide repository file hashes.

atomicCreationMigration.impact: public.bridge_create_mvp_transaction(p_payload jsonb) is absent in staging, as separately recorded in the atomic-RPC blocker evidence.

orderingFinding.risk: Applying only the atomic-creation migration would bypass required history analysis and could make the staging schema state harder to recover.

deploymentRule: Do not apply 202607180046 or any other missing migration to staging until the missing ranges are classified, dependencies are reviewed, and one safe ordered reconciliation plan is approved.
requiredNextPhase: Phase 1B — classify each missing range and its dependencies against the live staging schema before preparing a reconciliation migration plan.
